title: Cipher Maps: A Unified Framework for Oblivious Function Approximation Through Algebraic Structures and Bernoulli Models
description: A theoretical framework unifying oblivious function approximation, algebraic cipher types, and Bernoulli data models for privacy-preserving computation. Formalizes cipher functors as proper functors on monoids, develops encoding set theory, introduces the space-optimal Singular Hash Map, and proves composition theorems for layered security.
